data.title: Pendle: No attack, all funds are safe
data.description: Pendle posted on the X platform that it had not been attacked and all funds were safe.

data.title: Farcaster: App registration is now free
data.description: Farcaster, a decentralized social protocol, announced in an X-platform post that the registration process for its app is now free and that it is piloting a new anti-fraud system that will prevent spammers and fraudsters from registering large numbers of accounts.

data.title: Pendle is suspected of being attacked, with the attacker minting free PT and YT and then selling them.
data.description: According to @Pixonchain, Pendle may have been attacked. An attacker is minting free PT and YT and selling them on the market. Wallet address: 0x3c34abb66270e0287d138c2cbb69da85cdea3a8e

data.title: US Trade Representative Greer: Office will remain operational even if government shuts down
data.description: U.S. Trade Representative Greer stated that U.S. tariff revenue could reach $600 billion to $1 trillion annually, and that the Office of the U.S. Trade Representative would remain operational even during a government shutdown. Furthermore, the Congressional Budget Office (CBO) stated that 750,000 employees could be furloughed daily during a government shutdown. (Jinshi)

data.title: Phantom Launches Phantom Cash, a One-Stop Crypto Financial Transaction Function
data.description: Crypto wallet Phantom announced the launch of Phantom Cash, a one-stop crypto financial transaction feature on the X platform. This feature consolidates crypto payments, token trading, and withdrawals into a single Solana-powered currency account. Users can pay with Apple Pay, Google Pay, or a virtual or physical Phantom debit card wherever Visa is accepted. Users can also enable virtual account payments and deposit funds using Stripe's one-time verification.

data.title: Data: Since 2013, Bitcoin's average October return has been 21.89%, while Ethereum's is 4.77%.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that since 2013, Bitcoin's average October return has been +21.89%, with only two years in the past 12 years having negative October returns (2014 and 2018).

data.title: YielBasis raised $195 million in Legion's first pre-sale, exceeding its target by 98 times.
data.description: Legion announced on the X platform that the Yield Basis presale has concluded, with over 60,000 addresses applying and raising a total of $195 million, exceeding the target by 98 times. The project team will review applications, and participants will be notified of their allocation results via email within 24 hours.

data.title: Metaplanet CEO: Bitcoin performance will be announced on October 1st, and will be disclosed regularly on a quarterly basis thereafter
data.description: Simon Gerovich, CEO of Metaplanet, a Japanese Bitcoin treasury company, announced on the X platform that the company plans to release its Bitcoin business performance on October 1st. It will then disclose results regularly every quarter, and will adopt a proactive disclosure system starting in fiscal 2025. This will allow investors to understand the performance of the company's Bitcoin business as soon as possible, without having to wait for the 45-day disclosure deadline after the end of each quarter.

data.title: Gate will launch TRUTH perpetual contract trading
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate will launch TRUTH perpetual contract trading (settled in USDT) for the first time at 21:00 (UTC+8) on October 1, supporting 1-20x leverage.

data.title: 800,000 US government employees face potential pay cuts due to the government shutdown, and Friday's non-farm payroll report is likely to be delayed.
data.description: The U.S. federal government officially shut down at 12:01 a.m. ET on Wednesday, after Democrats and Republicans failed to reach an agreement on a short-term spending plan. Due to the government data center shutdown, the September non-farm payroll report, originally scheduled for release this Friday, is likely to be delayed, depriving economists and investors of this crucial benchmark. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bybit supports UXLINK (UXLINK) contract migration
data.description: According to UXLINK's official contract migration plan, Bybit has confirmed support for the migration. All users who successfully deposited before 14:55 (UTC) on September 22, 2025, will be included in the token migration. Please note that deposits and withdrawals of UXLINK to the old contract have been permanently suspended, but other functions such as trading will remain unaffected. After the migration is complete, UXLINK will only support deposits via the ETH (ERC-20) network; deposits via the Arbitrum network will no longer be accepted. Bybit plans to reopen UXLINK deposits and withdrawals at 10:00 (UTC) on October 2, 2025, but delays are possible due to unforeseen circumstances. For more details on the project's migration plan, please refer to the official announcement. For any questions, please contact Bybit Customer Service.

data.title: An insider whale transferred 668,000 USDC to GMX to open a 95x leveraged Bitcoin short position.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, an "insider whale" has just concluded his short position on Hyperliquid, closing all of his XRP short positions. His return has been met with failure: five days ago, he transferred 4.22 million USDC to Hyperliquid to begin his short position. After closing all his positions today, he was left with only $668,000 USDC, a loss of $3.55 million. Did you think he'd given up? No, he's moved on: he withdrew the remaining 668,000 USDC from his Hyperliquid position and transferred it to GMX. With a whopping 95x leverage, he shorted $59.89 million worth of BTC... The opening price was $114,560, and the liquidation price was $115,131. This... even the slightest fluctuation would have wiped him out...

data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, the GSR Markets marked address transferred 153,000 LINK to Binance about seven hours ago, worth $3.3 million.

data.title: A newly created wallet transferred 85 million FF tokens to Binance, worth $17.01 million.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, about four hours ago, a newly created wallet transferred 85 million FFs worth US$17.01 million to the Binance hot wallet address.

data.title: Former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler may be under investigation for deleting text messages from phones issued during his tenure.
data.description: Republicans in the U.S. House of Representatives sent a letter to Paul Atkins, Chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), requesting an investigation into the deletion of official text messages by former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler during his tenure. The SEC's Office of Internal Oversight (OIG) stated in a report in early September that the SEC during Gensler's tenure had issues with transparency and compliance. The report revealed that the SEC's Information Technology Division implemented an erroneous automated policy that resulted in the complete wiping of Gary Gensler's government-issued phone, along with the deletion of text messages from October 2022 to September 2023. Republican lawmakers criticized Gensler for having a double standard, stating that while in 2023 he filed lawsuits against multiple financial institutions for "recordkeeping failures" and collected over $400 million in fines, he failed to ensure his own institution's compliance record. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Shutdown Threat Delays Data, Fuels Uncertainty Across Markets
data.description:
As U. S. budget standoff puts jobs data in jeopardy, digital assets gain ground on safe-haven appeal and Fed uncertainty.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/10/01/shutdown-threat-delays-data-fuels-uncertainty-across-markets/
